activities_around_place_1_desc: Short note on woodland walks and quiet paths near the campsite.
activities_around_place_2_desc: Brief text about nearby lakes and places to cool off in summer.
activities_around_place_3_desc: Suggested stops for a half-day trip by bike or car.
activities_around_place_4_desc: Seasonal produce and small country shops in the area.
activities_around_place_5_desc: Easy routes suited to families and small groups.
activities_around_place_6_desc: Open fire rings and rest areas in natural settings.
activities_at_place_1_desc: Shared kitchen, campfire spots and tent field on the grounds.
activities_at_place_2_desc: Volleyball, mini golf and mini football — available for campsite guests.
activities_at_place_3_desc: Hiking trails and easy walks around the property and nearby.
activities_at_place_4_desc: Activities for children and adults in a safe setting.
activities_at_place_5_desc: Seasonal water activities by prior arrangement.
activities_at_place_6_desc: Showers, toilets and waste sorting available around the clock.
rules_nav_personal: Rules for the processing of personal data
rules_hero_personal: RULES FOR THE PROCESSING OF PERSONAL DATA
rules_personal_intro: This page describes how the Ropažkalns campsite processes personal data in accordance with applicable data protection law (including the GDPR where applicable).
rules_personal_p_1: The data controller is the operator of the Ropažkalns campsite. For questions about this policy, use the contact details shown in the website footer.
rules_personal_p_2: Depending on how you use our services, we may process identification and contact data (such as name, telephone number and email address), reservation and stay-related information, and limited technical data related to your use of the website.
rules_personal_p_3: Personal data is processed to handle reservations and enquiries, communicate with guests, provide services at the campsite, improve the website experience, and comply with legal obligations. Processing is based on contract, legitimate interests, or consent where required.
rules_personal_p_4: Data is kept only for as long as necessary for the purposes described, including statutory retention periods where applicable.
rules_personal_p_5: You may have the right to access, rectify or erase your data, restrict or object to certain processing, request data portability, and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. To exercise your rights, contact us using the details on this website.
rules_terms_intro: By using the Ropažkalns campsite and related services, you agree to follow these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
rules_terms_p_1: These terms apply to stays, day visits and rentals offered by Ropažkalns unless otherwise agreed in writing. Specific services may have additional rules communicated at booking or on site.
rules_terms_p_2: Reservations are confirmed according to the process described in the booking information. Prices, payment terms and cancellation rules apply as stated at the time of booking.
rules_terms_p_3: Guests must respect quiet hours, nature and other visitors. Open fires only in designated areas. Follow staff instructions regarding safety and use of facilities.
rules_terms_p_4: Guests use the site and activities at their own risk where permitted by law. We are not liable for loss or damage except where such exclusion is not allowed by mandatory law.
rules_terms_p_5: We may update these terms from time to time. The version published on this website applies unless otherwise communicated.
activities_around_detail_1_intro: Explore woodland paths and quiet nature around Ropažkalns — short loops for a morning walk or a longer afternoon stroll.
activities_around_detail_1_bullets: Forest loop near the campsite — easy, about 2–3 km
Broader trails toward open fields — moderate, about 4–5 km
Sunset walk along tree lines — relaxed pace, under 1 hour
activities_around_detail_2_intro: Cool off in summer at nearby lakes and rivers. Ask at reception for the best spots and water safety tips.
activities_around_detail_2_bullets: Deeper areas for swimming — use marked places only
Changing weather — bring dry clothes and sun protection
activities_around_detail_3_intro: Plan a half-day trip to castles, manor parks and small museums in the wider Ropaži region.
activities_around_detail_3_bullets: Historic castle mounds and viewing points
Seasonal fairs and local exhibitions — check dates
activities_around_detail_4_intro: Pick up bread, honey, berries and other seasonal produce from farm shops and weekend markets.
activities_around_detail_4_bullets: Small farm shops within a short drive
Summer and autumn markets — best variety
activities_around_detail_5_intro: Easy cycling and walking routes for families and small groups — combine with a picnic stop.
activities_around_detail_5_bullets: Quiet side roads and gravel paths — low traffic
Round trip from Ropažkalns — distance on request
Walking pairs well with forest and lake viewpoints
activities_around_detail_6_intro: Use public fire rings and rest areas for a safe outdoor meal — bring your own wood or ask about availability.
activities_around_detail_6_bullets: Keep fires only in designated places
Leave no trace — take rubbish with you
activities_at_detail_1_intro: Cook together, light a campfire in the shared area and spread out on the tent field — the heart of outdoor life at Ropažkalns.
activities_at_detail_1_bullets: Campfire spots — follow site rules and fire safety
Tent pitches with access to water and facilities
activities_at_detail_2_intro: Volleyball, mini golf and mini football are on site for guests — ideal for friendly games between swims or hikes.
activities_at_detail_2_bullets: Volleyball — net and ball often available at reception
Mini golf — clubs for rent or bring your own
Mini football — small pitch, suitable for children and casual play
activities_at_detail_3_intro: Walk marked paths on the property and connect to longer routes in the surrounding forest and fields.
activities_at_detail_3_bullets: Short loops on the grounds — easy orientation
Links to regional trails — ask for a map
Morning and evening walks — wildlife-friendly, stay on paths
activities_at_detail_4_intro: Trampoline and climbing wall offer active fun for kids and adults in a supervised, safety-first setup.
activities_at_detail_4_bullets: Trampoline — age and weight limits apply
Climbing wall — use provided equipment only
Children must be accompanied by an adult
activities_at_detail_5_intro: Water skiing and lake activities run in season and by arrangement — equipment and time slots depend on weather and staff.
activities_at_detail_5_bullets: Book in advance at reception or when reserving your stay
Weather-dependent — may be postponed for safety
activities_at_detail_6_intro: Showers, toilets and waste sorting are available 24/7 so you can travel light and keep the site clean.
activities_at_detail_6_bullets: Hot showers in the main sanitary building
Please keep facilities tidy for other guests
camping_houses_paragraph: Cosy wooden chalets for a peaceful holiday for couples, families or individual travellers close to nature.
camping_houses_note1: Kitchen, toilet, and showers are in the nearby sanitary facility.
gallery_forest_desc: Surrounded by peaceful forest, Ropažkalns offers a true escape into nature.
gallery_camping_desc: Cosy wooden cabins for a comfortable stay close to nature.
gallery_hottub_desc: Relax in our hot tub or sauna after a day of activities.
gallery_intro: Browse photos by category. Click an image for a larger view.
contact_booking_paragraph: To make a booking, select your preferred dates, fill in your contact details and preferences, and submit your request. We will confirm availability shortly.
contact_general_paragraph: If you have any questions or would like to know more about what we have to offer, feel free to contact us.
rental_buggy_desc: The buggy is perfect for thrilling off-road rides through forest trails and open fields. Ideal for 2 passengers.
rental_buggy_li2: Drivers must be 18+ with valid license
rental_bike_desc: Ride freely around the area on our powerful motorbike — suitable for both beginners and experienced riders.
rental_ski_desc: Enjoy an adrenaline-filled ride across the lake with our water skis. Great for both beginners and experienced users.
rental_house_desc: Perfect for family retreats or peaceful weekends. Our wooden cabin includes full amenities and a view of nature.
rental_house_li2: Includes shower, mini kitchen, and terrace
homepage_intro_2: Ropažkalns is located in the beautiful Latvian countryside, surrounded by verdant forests and rolling hills. Our passion for nature inspired us to create a place where people can escape the rush of the city and enjoy the peace of the countryside.
homepage_intro_paragraph_1: We invite you to take a break from the rush of everyday life and recharge your soul with peaceful mornings and enchanting evenings filled with birdsong, silence and nature.
homepage_intro_paragraph_2: Whether you are planning a holiday in a cottage or camping with your own tent or camper, Ropažkalns offers a spacious and peaceful place to relax.
homepage_note_quiet_policy: We welcome guests who appreciate quiet natural retreats (no music except on special occasions). After 23:00 - 100% silence is expected. We do not organise loud parties or events.
homepage_opening_season: Ropažkalns is open from 1st of April to 1st of October every year.
homepage_pet_policy: If you are visiting us with pets (especially dogs), please read our rules on the Pet Policy page.
hot_tub_li2: Scenic view of the surrounding nature
hot_tub_li4: Clean, warm water and evening atmosphere
hot_tub_prices_row2_col1: With overnight stay (e.g. by the cabin)
hot_tub_price_note: Price includes water heating, wood burning, and hot tub cleaning after use.
our_story_paragraph_1: Ropažkalns was born out of our passion for nature and the countryside.
our_story_paragraph_2: The surrounding verdant forests and peaceful hills inspired us to create a place where people can find peace and relax away from the hustle and bustle of the city.
our_story_paragraph_3: The idea came from personal experience - the desire to find a place in Latvia where one can simply enjoy the silence, space and nature without disturbance.
our_story_paragraph_4: In addition to outdoor activities, we also offer accommodations that blend harmoniously with nature.
our_story_paragraph_5: We invite you to experience the peace, stillness, and deep connection with nature that Ropažkalns offers.
our_vision_paragraph_1: Our vision is to create a place where people can reconnect with themselves and with nature.
our_vision_paragraph_2: We want to develop Ropažkalns as a peaceful place for recreation that promotes balance, sustainable tourism and a conscious lifestyle.
our_vision_paragraph_3: At Ropažkalns, we offer a wide range of activities, including hiking, mountain biking, horseback riding, and more. Our experienced guides are nature enthusiasts committed to providing a safe and enjoyable experience for all our guests.
our_vision_paragraph_4: In addition to outdoor activities, we offer a variety of accommodations – cozy cabins, luxurious tents, and a beautiful guest house. All our accommodations are designed to blend harmoniously with the surrounding nature, giving guests a unique and immersive experience.
our_vision_paragraph_5: Whether you're looking for peaceful relaxation or an adventure-filled getaway, Ropažkalns has something for everyone. Come visit and experience the charm of the Latvian countryside yourself!
private_events_paragraph: Organise birthdays, small weddings or family celebrations in a quiet and natural setting.
private_events_instruction: For private events to rent out the entire place, call our CEO or COO to schedule a time and duration.
private_events_subtitle: Perfect venue for your special occasions and corporate events
private_events_pricing_notice: For large events, we discuss the prices for hosting weddings, anniversaries, and sports games individually, taking into account the duration, location, and other details of the event.
private_events_form_location_ph: Which part of the venue, or special layout needs
private_events_form_extras_help: Tick anything you would like us to arrange.
private_events_form_success: Thanks! We received your inquiry and will get back to you shortly.
private_events_form_error: Sorry, the inquiry could not be sent. Please try again.
rental_prices_paragraph: Check out our prices for accommodation, sauna, hot tub and activity rentals in Ropažkalns.
rental_prices_included: All prices include: parking, access to restrooms, grill, campfire site, and shared kitchen.
sauna_rental_paragraph: Relax in the wood-heated country sauna, enjoying the warmth and silence of nature.
sauna_li1: Traditional wooden sauna with a view of nature
sauna_li4: Perfect for small groups of friends
sauna_price_note: Includes sauna, firewood heating, shower room, changing room, and lounge area.
tent_place_paragraph: Pitch your tent or camper in the spacious meadow with campfire sites and access to facilities.
tent_place_li1: Tent setup on the lakeside lawn
tent_place_li3: Kitchen, toilet, and shower in the main building
tent_place_note: Includes parking near tent, shared kitchen, toilets, showers, picnic tables, grill, and firepit.
reservation_subtitle: Choose items, dates, and your contact details, then calculate the price and confirm your request.
offcanvas_description: Ropazkalns is a full-service outdoor activities and recreation center. We offer various activities in nature, camping cabins, tent places and much more. Discover the beauty of nature with us!
address: Kalna Paltes, Ropaži, Ropažu pagasts, LV-2135
